div.div:
Determine Tier
Deep: 3+ surface hints,
auth+crypto, agentic/MCP
Standard: 1-2 hints, M effort
Light: none-apparent,
S effort, UI/docs only

div.div:
Assign Confidence
3/3 reviewers: HIGH
2/3 reviewers: MEDIUM
1/3 reviewers: LOW
severity: majority vote
or median if all differ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.div:
Resolve Verdict
Critical + HIGH/MED: FAIL
Critical + LOW: CONCERNS
High/Medium any: CONCERNS
5+ NFR gaps: CONCERNS
else: PASS
